title: Meta Hopes to Launch Stablecoin Payments Project This Year
message_html: Meta Hopes to Launch Stablecoin Payments Project This Year ...
snippet: Meta is hoping to enter the stablecoin payment space sometime this year, CoinDesk reported Tuesday (Feb. 24), citing unnamed sources. The move would happen if the Facebook owner is successful in integrating with a third-party company to facilitate stablecoin payments, the report said. Meta wants to

title: WisdomTree Gets SEC Nod to Enable Instant Settlement for Tokenized Money Market Fund
message_html: WisdomTree Gets SEC Nod to Enable Instant Settlement for Tokenized Money Market Fund ...
snippet: WisdomTree is enabling instant settlement for its tokenized money market fund, indicating its product won't be limited by Wall Street’s pace.
